title: Diplopennies
actors: Aliki Vougiouklaki, Dimitris Papamichael, Vasilis Avlonitis
plot: A maestro who happened to pass by near a construction site hears the sweet song of a poor worker and offers him a job as a member of his band. Now, his wife, too, wants to unfold her talent in the nightclub. But, who is the bigges...
